title: SCREENWISE-ENROLLING - 211info
text: LEGACY MEDICAL GROUP MOUNT HOOD WOMEN'S HEALTH SCREENWISE-ENROLLING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers breast or cervical cancer screenings and/or diagnostics through a network of providers. Helps reduce cancer burden through early detection, risk screening, education, and linkage to medical treatment. 24850 SE Stark Street Suite 200 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: -Ages 18-39 needing breast or cervical cancer diagnostic services (determined by clinician) regardless of gender -Age 40 or older needing breast or cervical cancer screening and/or diagnostic services regardless of gender -Must live or intend to live in Oregon Household income at or below 250% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) -Must be uninsured or have insurance but not enough to cover their needs Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (503) 491-9444 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 491-9444 Screenwise (971) 673-0581 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Breast Examinations Breast Self Examination Instruction Mammograms Pap Tests If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LEGACY MEDICAL GROUP MOUNT HOOD WOMEN'S HEALTH
